use_cases: Highlighting specific data points on time-series charts with draggable annotations
Interactive data exploration with nearest-point detection and anchor line display
Financial data visualization with customizable label and subject positioning
Creating tooltips and contextual annotations on SVG-based charts
Dashboard components requiring user-editable chart annotations
ai_summary: An interactive SVG-based annotation chart component for data visualization, built with @visx. Supports draggable annotation labels, configurable connector types (line, elbow, curve), and multiple subject markers (circle, vertical/horizontal lines). Features nearest-datum detection for hover interactions, adjustable anchor lines, and customizable positioning. Ideal for analytics dashboards, financial charts, and any data-rich interface requiring contextual annotations with user-editable positions.
